assertions.assertion: Sets options.MutualTls.Enabled = true in AddIdentityServer options
assertions.rationale: AddIdentityServer is called without any options lambda; MutualTls.Enabled is never set.

assertions.assertion: Sets options.MutualTls.DomainName = 'mtls' for the mTLS subdomain
assertions.rationale: No MutualTls.DomainName configuration at all. The response vaguely suggests configuring a reverse proxy for the subdomain.

assertions.assertion: Calls AddMutualTlsSecretValidators() on the IdentityServer builder
Configures the client secret with Type = SecretTypes.X509CertificateThumbprint (or IdentityServerConstants.SecretTypes.X509CertificateThumbprint)
assertions.rationale: The client secret is a plain string 'ABC123DEF456' without any Type set. No SecretTypes.X509CertificateThumbprint.

assertions.assertion: Adds certificate authentication scheme (AddCertificate) and references it via MutualTls.ClientCertificateAuthenticationScheme
assertions.rationale: AddCertificate("Certificate") is present but MutualTls.ClientCertificateAuthenticationScheme is never set, so the link between them is missing. Fails the combined assertion.
